name: Holiday Fruit Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup uncooked Quaker Oats (quick or old-fashioned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Line the bottom of a 10-inch tube pan with waxed paper.
2. Grease and flour the pan well.
3. Sift together flour, baking powder, salt, and spices.
4. Add candied fruits, raisins, pecans, and oats; stir to coat evenly with the flour mixture.
5. Beat eggs until light and fluffy. Gradually beat in sugar, oil, and milk.
6. Mix fruit ingredients into the batter well.
7. Pour batter into prepared pan.
8. Bake in a preheated slow oven (300°F) for about 2-1/2 hours.
9. Loosen edges with a knife when done baking.
10. Cool thoroughly before removing from the pan.
11. Wrap tightly and store in a cool place.
Makes one 10-inch tube cake.
